note: Phase 5 (PRD-v2 §7.5) lever-1 starting calibration — see src/scene/defaultShellTextures.ts and src/assets/shell-source-textures/README.md for the full explanation. Values below are a computed starting point (average-color-matched against spike/inputs/surfaces/*.JPG), not a final hand-tuned result — Shyam's own tint/repeat/roughness sliders in ShellPanel.tsx remain the way to refine further. wall/ceiling's source was converted to true greyscale (see README) before this sampling, specifically so tint alone can reach the target color exactly (no channel-clamping) — an unmodified color photo left an uncorrectable ~40/255 blue-channel deficit that rendered as a visible olive/yellow cast (recorded here as a real finding, not swept away).

sampledColors.method: 64x64 canvas downsample, mean RGB over all pixels, 0-255 scale

wall.attribution: BabylonJS/Assets (CC BY 4.0) — textures/sand.jpg, converted to greyscale before use (see README)

ceiling.attribution: BabylonJS/Assets (CC BY 4.0) — textures/sand.jpg, converted to greyscale before use (see README)
